description_long: This is a lifelike model of a bay horse with a rich, reddish-brown coat and a black mane and tail. The horse's body is sleek and muscular, with a well-defined neck, prominent withers, and a straight back. Its legs are slender yet sturdy, with white markings on the lower portions of all four legs, known as socks or stockings. The head is refined, featuring a straight profile, alert ears, and expressive eyes. The tail is slightly arched and the mane is short and close to the neck, giving the horse a neat appearance. The overall stance is natural and relaxed, as if the horse is calmly standing in an urban park or along a city street.
description: A realistic bay horse with a glossy reddish-brown coat, black mane and tail, and white markings on its lower legs, standing in a natural, relaxed pose.
description_view_0: Side view showing the horse's left profile, highlighting the muscular body, straight back, and white markings on the legs.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the width of the hindquarters, the black tail, and the symmetry of the white leg markings.
description_view_2: Side view showing the horse's right profile, similar to view 0 but with the tail more visible and the head slightly turned.
description_view_3: Front view emphasizing the horse's head, alert ears, straight facial markings, and the even placement of the front legs.
attribute_pose: The horse is standing squarely with a relaxed and attentive posture.
attribute_mane_style: The mane is short and neatly trimmed, lying close to the neck.
attribute_leg_position: All four legs are firmly planted on the ground in a natural, weight-bearing stance.
